chapter_title.en: Chapter on Establishing Testimony Based on Knowledge Without Formal Witnessing

text: 3325 - فَقَدْ قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "اَلْعِلْمُ شَهَادَةٌ إِذَا كَانَ صَاحِبُهُ مَظْلُوماً".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3325 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as), said:
"Knowledge is a testimony when its possessor is wronged."
